qa_pairs.question: What is the function of the `Status.run` command in the META package, and how does the `-f` option affect its output?
qa_pairs.answer: The `Status.run` command in the META package lists the statuses of all processed cases. When the optional `-f` argument is used, it sorts the output by exit status, showing cases with non-zero statuses at the bottom to make them easier to identify.

qa_pairs.question: How can users configure a META farm to automatically resubmit itself until all cases are processed?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can enable automatic resubmission for a META farm by including the `-auto` switch when executing the `submit.run` or `resubmit.run` command. This will cause the farm to resubmit itself automatically at the end, as many times as necessary, until all cases from `table.dat` have been successfully processed.
